title: Trajectory Checks for Tool-Using Assistants
abstract: A synthetic study comparing final-answer scoring with checks over intermediate tool actions. Trajectory checks reveal invalid calls that answer-only scoring misses.
evidence_claim: Trajectory-level evaluation detects invalid tool actions missed by final-answer-only scoring.

title: Reproducible Offline Benchmarks for Research Agents
abstract: A synthetic benchmark shows that fixed catalogues and canonical traces make research-agent comparisons repeatable across orchestration implementations.
evidence_claim: Fixed offline fixtures and canonical traces support reproducible comparisons of research agents.

title: Answer Accuracy Is Sufficient for Agent Evaluation
abstract: A deliberately conflicting synthetic position argues that intermediate actions add no useful evaluation signal.
evidence_claim: Final-answer accuracy alone is claimed to be sufficient.

title: Urban Pollinator Habitats
abstract: A synthetic and intentionally irrelevant ecology record.
